visual_observations.composition_style: product origin close-up — coffee bean macro photography
visual_observations.setting: close-up of coffee beans in hands, natural/earthy

text_overlays.content_summary: لكل حبة بن قصة — every coffee bean has a story, from earth to cup

notable_visual_elements: macro photography elevates coffee to artisan level
third piece in coffee sustainability series

notable_phrases: من الأرض لين ما توصل لك
voice_observations.caption_text:
لكل حبة بن قصة تبدا من الأرض لين ما توصل لك… وأكثر 🍂
كل ما تعرف أكثر، كل ما تكتشف إن القصة أعمق.

Every coffee bean has a story—one that begins in the soil and travels all the way to you… and beyond 🍂
The more you learn, the more you realize just how deep the story goes.
voice_observations.hook_text: لكل حبة بن قصة تبدا من الأرض لين ما توصل لك…

hospitality_cues: qahwa heritage — coffee as Saudi national identity
cultural_notes.free_notes: Poetic register ('قصة' — story, 'من الأرض' — from the earth) is unusual for fast food. Kudu using coffee as a brand elevation tool to move from fast food to 'quality casual'. Saudi coffee cultural identity is a strong hook.

pattern_matches.notes: Coffee bean as artisan product hero — farm-to-cup macro
Coffee bean story ties to Saudi qahwa heritage and national coffee identity
